entries.gt_05cab2ea1f1f8b: silence shows a dangerous straight line
entries.gt_06f751b1c9414a: Noise led to the hotspot. The choice here is simple: isolate, shoot, or leave.
entries.gt_0941f51482a2c5: Sealed supply of the quiet block
entries.gt_0ce49fdd2bd5c2: An old siren clicks in the wall. Better calculate the route to the crush in advance.
entries.gt_0fe1d8abeaf4ff: Neighbor rustling moves through the walls. This is not a crowd, but a place where you should choose a corner.
entries.gt_11970ae43aadf5: Pipe knocking led to a crushing passage. A dry corner is worth more than a round here.
entries.gt_1b32197c829fb7: The meat call faded behind you. The passage stayed behind to feed the silence.
entries.gt_1dc6301d53ab41: The empty tone led to a firing line. The wall matters more than the target.
entries.gt_33d27f3807333a: The cold trail led to a pocket. Beasts here are heard before they are seen.
entries.gt_3bf8f9fc687cc5: The rustle of folders led to a living chancery. Cover matters more here than a straight line.
entries.gt_3ce619f00571b8: walls lead to the noisy room
entries.gt_3d5dbfc15ca70f: The siren trail died behind you. The crush stayed on someone else's route.
entries.gt_5ee13a5f599222: The wall breathes in a warm rhythm. Dense fighting is ahead, but not mandatory.
entries.gt_60d9825a8e95d8: The ventilation crackles with frost. The HUD catches a cold passage where distance is safer.
entries.gt_661b88dcad5fd8: The frost stayed behind you. The cold pocket waits for now without witnesses.
entries.gt_68cf92156cef90: The siren trail led to a meat crush. Retreat matters here, not one more shot.
entries.gt_786c5176135f18: frost rustles toward a predator pocket
entries.gt_7e8da9f572060b: The pipes tap out a bypass. Water, metal, and a short ambush are audible ahead.
entries.gt_835e2ab0923f42: The pipe knocking sank into concrete. The ambush stayed aside, making noise.
entries.gt_88014b0ec9eda9: the crowd makes noise around the first deadman
entries.gt_989c88c60a22f2: The silence found a note. The HUD marks a straight line where standing exposed is unwise.
entries.gt_9d3187ba522fc4: The crowd stayed behind the wall. Hotspot zero got another minute.
entries.gt_ab3389b448e2b7: The rustle led to the noisy room. Decide: bypass, clear it, or grab the loot fast.
entries.gt_beadeda68d577b: The neighbor rustle stayed behind. The room can wait for another sortie.
entries.gt_cc594b5dc53232: papers lead to a living chancery
entries.gt_cef19ff6d7b4a4: The meat call led to a passage. Keep the retreat open here.
entries.gt_d0b6670cae92ed: Black Palm niche under a clean floor
entries.gt_e0da2ff3c38c28: siren leads to a fresh meat crush
entries.gt_fd23e857e329e2: The empty tone vanished. The dangerous straight line stayed off the route.
entries.gt_fd7ffe0e4af787: The folders keep rustling without you. The paper threat stayed aside.
entries.gt_ff8a63f93010e5: Folders rustle behind the wall. The sound makes it clear: ahead is not a queue, but a hunt for documents.
entries.gt_fffdb692d71b36: Behind the wall the crowd speaks too evenly. One voice is already not breathing.
entries.gt_ab5a7a3d9e36a4: Fire dried the seams of the Assembled Man: the growth will burn out faster.
entries.gt_ae594c5e8bf004: The Pipe Automaton found a wet straight line. The blue charge is readable before the shot.
entries.gt_ae60d06ac6718f: The Assembled Man knocked out a weak door, but did not touch the hermodoor threshold.
entries.gt_af857dfebdfba6: The lamps around you snapped sharply: Lampoglaz got a precise lock. Into darkness or behind a cabinet!
entries.gt_b86b29154c3759: The head slug slipped off the neck and is looking for a new body. Finish it before it crawls over.
entries.gt_ba3802857b5902: ${entityDisplayName(e)} crushed ${entityDisplayName(target)} with a wet PSI line
entries.gt_bab6269a57d734: Behind the door, three dry knocks: 'Cleanup. Open for verification'.
entries.gt_be578c3d251fb9: The Water Nightmare holds a wet line. Ripples move toward you, pressure rises.
entries.gt_bf4070de747765: Chitin moved under the foreman's collar. This is no longer an order, but a carrier.
entries.gt_c07f1d2b35d495: Treskotnik froze: red cracks flared before the straight lunge.
entries.gt_c26c7083da343c: Fire squeezed the Carpet: spore veins pulled in for a few seconds.
entries.gt_c3a60921dbeba3: The green light of Chervie cut out. Without screen and apparatus, the cables slowed down.
entries.gt_c653d92c6aed6d: The Deep Shadow struck with its second body: -
entries.gt_c7b8bb01a7ea1c: Lampoglaz gathers a green dot along the lit strip. Break the line.
entries.gt_ca481050c507f1: Olgoy-Khorkhoy rose from the pipe. Dry floor and meat bait matter more than heroics right now.
entries.gt_cd678f04f0b21a: Light pulled the real joint of the Fogman out of the fog.
entries.gt_cdc5c1fa048787: The Assembled Man gained mass: growth ${runtime.stacks}/${SOBRANNYY_MAX_STACKS}.
entries.gt_cf90148008d717: The Deep Shadow left a second silhouette. Do not chase the dark trail: keep the lit exit.
entries.gt_d1e4661c287f3b: The borshchevik roots cracked in a weak wall. The bypass is changing.
entries.gt_d21f1de9c30266: ${name} aims along a straight line. Cover or a corner breaks the line of fire.
entries.gt_d318e4c6175f6d: The Black Liquidator approached too evenly. There is no living breath under the mask.
entries.gt_d3fb231d811112: Safeguard spreads its blades. Behind a door, behind an apparatus, or use buckshot!
entries.gt_d4b95c83153dc5: Bonecutter saw you. Keep distance: the windup can be read.
entries.gt_d8ae105890c7ed: Bonecutter raises its saws. Back around a corner or hit it with buckshot!
entries.gt_d91795be1db0e8: The Chancery Idol holds an office line: cabinets dampen the field, papers in your pocket strengthen the volley.
entries.gt_d98e17961b779e: Slime film eats the sole. A cleaning kit, fire, or a dry bypass keeps the passage open.
entries.gt_dac0927db52eca: Panelnik lost the wall. Dust settled: armor is gone, tempo dropped.
entries.gt_df7039a02ae300: ${entityDisplayName(e)} missed: the target left the swing.
entries.gt_dfff2fd8d098b3: The black-slime ripple died behind a corner or a dry edge. You can close in now.
entries.gt_e0ffdc97d6cf95: The Idol's office field hit a cabinet or wall. There is a window after the break.
entries.gt_e32b55fcb9913a: ${entityDisplayName(e)} hits ${label} from the side out of a prepared line: -${dmg}
entries.gt_e3db4535488ac3: The Eye holds a straight line. The green warmup is readable before the shot.
entries.gt_e3f99c1b045935: ${entityDisplayName(e)} killed ${entityDisplayName(target)} with the first metal lunge
entries.gt_e6a422a06d6834: The hermodoor cut off the Assembled Man. Do not open it back up.
entries.gt_ec7d2f529bc04b: The Robot took a plasma line. After the volley, it has a pause.
entries.gt_ed1df771270577: ${entityDisplayName(e)} dragged the body into the collector
entries.gt_ee563c81ed4b99: An even stack of rusty rods unfolded at your feet. Dodge the first lunge.
entries.gt_f108112d9148a5: Rzhavnik hit with the first lunge: -${damage}. Now the body is brittle.
entries.gt_f127d4a601a4b1: The Robot's plasma line broke. The pause is short, close in.
entries.gt_f15b01cac57d94: The Fogman lost its false silhouette outside dense fog.
entries.gt_f5e700c36b8d0d: The green dog yelped at the loud metal and tears the pack apart.
entries.gt_f8589f16f969ac: The Idol gathers a PSI beam. A wall, door, or committed push dampens the source.
entries.gt_f948a861372fce: Dry concrete broke the wet PSI line. A short window to rush or retreat.
entries.gt_faf8e4a5cad601: The Protocolist started verification without papers. A short fight or exit is safer for now.
entries.gt_fb05d69da266a8: The Slime Woman dries out on bright dry concrete. You can hold her tempo now.
entries.gt_fb998a8bd6b6cc: Behind doors and in the corridor, a dog's howl answers. The pack has a shared scent.
entries.gt_fc10c94b83de62: Lampoglaz's green lock broke against the geometry.
entries.gt_fdfabd693f5264: The Pipe Automaton lost the wet straight line. A flank or dry cell broke the charge.
entries.gt_ffa1cec61735f8: The Pipe Automaton's blue rings brighten over water. Step off the line before the flash.
entries.gt_9aabb51a79622b: ${npc.name ?? 'Сосед'} was entered in the roster by the yellow hermodoor. There is less water and air now.
entries.gt_9d30f248866983: Water is running over the floor. Do not stand low, get to a dry door!
entries.gt_a1ba175991b2de: Do not wait for the siren. The silence is already warning you, to the hermodoor!
entries.gt_a2849d4b39bf67: Last aftermath: ${Number.isFinite(lastAftermathAt) ? Math.max(0, Math.round(knownSamosborTime - lastAftermathAt)) + 's ago' : '-'}
entries.gt_a976ada25e85ea: The roster eye opened in zone ${zone.id + 1}. Kill it so the fog releases the hermodoor.
entries.gt_a9a6739cfe79a8: You went to the bell. An eye opened at the yellow mark; now you will have to fight through to shelter.
entries.gt_b178bd1c4d9ff8: HERMODOORS: closure delayed. Do not stand in the corridor, find the second circuit.
entries.gt_b308789b88fe20: map: repeated door; green glow burns
entries.gt_b7ff224f9812bc: Fog in zone ${zoneId} cleared. Liquidators can enter.
entries.gt_bc061abe6f8d79: The siren started. Legs to the hermodoor, head down!
entries.gt_bc24f5f5e6099f: map: risk zone marked; leave or seal yourself in
entries.gt_c40647c79cbb31: Maronary brought out a large beast in zone ${zone.id + 1}. Kill it or leave the repeated door.
entries.gt_c5cca4e84771b3: You closed the yellow hermodoor from inside. The roster will leave an empty line for the one who knocked outside.
entries.gt_cc389e7d86d3f6: HERMODOORS: closing. Do not stand outside; enter a room or find the second circuit.
entries.gt_d3af389715463b: Maronary: green source and repeated door marked. The glow burns; check the route by number, not by green light.
entries.gt_d509cefc467ffe: Meat has started in the walls. Do not stand where it is warm, run from the zone!
entries.gt_d7b27126d9cf85: Maronary's green glow burns skin. Move away from the source.
entries.gt_d9e8f615761bff: Hear that? To the hermodoor while the seal holds!
entries.gt_da4b023a1c6492: The yellow hermodoors closed softly. It got tighter inside.
entries.gt_e0247b06d7f052: ELECTROSBOR in ${seconds}s: ${zoneText}. Get away from lamps, seal up early.
entries.gt_e6c573a2fac6d0: Shelter failed: the player stayed outside a working hermodoor.
entries.gt_eaaeff54c46cea: map: green source burns; keep away
entries.gt_ed7525a37d42da: HERMODOORS: early closure. Whoever is at the handle, inside now.
entries.gt_f3f7cadf4a938b: neighbors: ${barkCount} warnings; listen for short commands
entries.gt_f61ef9691af72e: Warning accepted: ${audioLine}; ${visualLine}; ${npcLine}. Decision: hermodoor, zone border, or early closure.
entries.gt_fd471403a47457: MARONARY in ${seconds}s: ${zoneText}. Do not look at the green source, check the door number.
entries.gt_0d4fc42a818e24: [HEATLINE] no nodes found on this floor
entries.gt_18066e0bf34650: The valve is still knocking after the last turn.
entries.gt_3c3058ec08d7e7: Heatline Zero: manual release open pressure 0${recoveredFrom ? ' после доводки' : ''}
entries.gt_4be13aad07c30f: Sealant caught the seam. Pressure became tolerable, but without cord the short passage is not open.
entries.gt_67b3f1f964fa50: Heatline Zero: cooled short passage heat 0 pressure 0
entries.gt_6a693600a73da5: Steam already tore the valve loose. Without the full kit there is nothing to repeat: only listen to the burn dry.
entries.gt_8c1787b2222fb8: Heatline Zero: shower bypass primary heat 0
entries.gt_97730ced99373d: The manometer twitched and settled. Pressure is released, the short passage cooled.
entries.gt_a24bb1f518778e: Heatline Zero: repair box sealed after release
entries.gt_a4c6387754d183: The valve tore loose in steam. Need asbestos cord and sealant; the manometer will save your skin.
entries.gt_a525662ae0b369: The cord settled on the valve. Pressure became tolerable, but without sealant the short passage is not open.
entries.gt_aaef9442ca68db: Heatline Zero: repair box empty after blind release
entries.gt_b0c806bfc53777: Heatline Zero: shower bypass wet reserve
entries.gt_b5ec3a4f2e5fac: Heatline Zero: manual release open without needle
entries.gt_c701c922c4a3d5: Heatline Zero: blind short passage steam 1 pressure 0
entries.gt_cfd9f4c1038a8d: Heatline Zero: repair box waits for ${part === 'cord' ? 'герметик' : 'асбестовый шнур'}
entries.gt_d038a51a8a6182: Heatline Zero: repair box wet after ${HEATLINE_VENTED}
entries.gt_d8e914f0066423: Partial cord already holds. Need sealant; without it the valve only gets angrier.
entries.gt_da1a3338b9d2e6: Heatline Zero: muted short passage heat 1 pressure 1
entries.gt_db70b8ce02e54c: Blind release worked. Steam went to the neighbors, the corridor is open, skin disagrees.
entries.gt_f2fa5d670ad345: The heatline is already released. The short passage is conditionally safe.
entries.gt_f896846ba4c5af: Partial sealant already holds. Need asbestos cord; without it the valve only gets angrier.
entries.gt_3b928703599c61: ${npc.name}: Bring ${def.name} ×${count} to ${ctx.roomName}. Payment after delivery; do not drag it out until the siren.
entries.gt_46704a51cabd72: ${npc.name}: Check ${room.name} ${toroidalDirection(world, npc.x, npc.y, room.x, room.y)}. Need a mark, not a story.
entries.gt_690617465ad3d5: ${npc.name}: Deliver a message to ${target.name}. They are ${toroidalDirection(world, npc.x, npc.y, target.x, target.y)}; payment after the answer.
entries.gt_71d550b8ff9288: I will pass it on, thanks.
entries.gt_7b2d2a6007a5da: ${npc.name} does not want to talk to you.
entries.gt_a3b65d2acc9b82: ${npc.name}: Still have not finished the last task?
entries.gt_a4f8e146231a93: ${npc.name}: I have nothing to assign you.
entries.gt_d23c519d80531d: You hear roaring and scraping - the route got loud!
entries.gt_d68de23c98e177: ${targetNpc.name}: I will pass it on, thanks.
entries.gt_03024d63db6c74: The queue broke. The spike is yours, the exit counts to eighteen.
entries.gt_0fd708119af714: The debt went into the lower bypass. No reward, the counter did not wake.
entries.gt_10dae4718d3fcf: not enough ammo or money for the toll
entries.gt_13f369d6a04f8b: P-46: record accepted before the first question.
entries.gt_3174b704d25154: Protocol issued a stabilizer and energy cells.
entries.gt_45b464524ce4d0: P-46 accepted obedience: exit open, spike remained in the line.
entries.gt_662258267686fd: Broken toll backlash closed the entrance: -2
entries.gt_66ba4781003ecd: The dead counter paid with someone else's line.
entries.gt_6ce1b10629f404: Reverse clearance backlash jerked your hand: -1
entries.gt_740593219fcb45: The receipt reached a live counter.
entries.gt_7458f2c55c17eb: Protocol clicked: backpack did not accept the reward.
entries.gt_9aa5e1a1152859: The PSI backlash protocol passed through you: -3
entries.gt_9de80df2bd9cf2: BACKLASH: PSI pulse returned as a second strike: -4
entries.gt_cbb0daeae13ed9: P-46 clicked: backpack did not accept the spike.
entries.gt_cc1092cc1f0568: Borrowed light left as evidence. No reward, doors do not take interest.
entries.gt_effde9e95a7f02: P-46: saved locally. Do not present to the elevator.
entries.gt_1b911c076722c1: The room will appear on the map after entering the floor.
entries.gt_b2fbf64aee2c3a: Contact is on another level. Need an elevator.
entries.gt_5ef2dee281ed43: No snapshot: wait for a simulation tick.
